name: Trans American Aquaculture, Inc
summary: PART I As used in this Form 10-K, the terms we, us, our, and the Company refer to Trans American Aquaculture, Inc., a Colorado corporation. Organization Trans American Aquaculture, Inc. Trans American Aquaculture, Inc. was originally incorporated in the State of Delaware on September 18, 2006 as Omega Environmental, Inc.
